reviews.comment:
La atención es muy buena, son muy colaboradores y te tiran todos los datos. El único bajón es que no atienden 24hs y los días que estuvimos no funcionaba la cafetera.
Los que atienden son muy amables

(Translated by Google)
The service is excellent; they're very helpful and provide all the information you need. The only downside is that they're not open 24 hours, and the coffee machine wasn't working the days we were there.

The staff are very friendly.
